name: Playtime
title: Playtime Design System
concept: Modernist glass architecture, formal grids, and controlled comic release inspired by Jacques Tati's Playtime.
inspiration: Inspired by Playtime (1967): office glass, civic signage, airport rhythm, and sudden chromatic release.
summary: Playtime is a restrained architectural system that begins in cool glass mode and blooms into a warmer after-hours theme when the interface needs theatrical looseness.
searchText: Playtime Jacques Tati design system glass modernism airport signage office grid royal garden chromatic release
